description: Use nanobot from Microsoft Teams chats.
requirements: Azure bot app credentials, public callback endpoint

setup.tryIt: Install the Teams app and send a test message.
setup.summary: Teams receives messages through the Bot Framework callback URL. It needs a reachable HTTPS endpoint in production.
steps: Create an Azure Bot or Teams app and copy its App ID and client secret.
Expose the callback path over HTTPS and add it as the bot messaging endpoint.
Save and enable Teams, then install the app and send a test message.

appId.label: App ID
appId.help: Copy it from the Azure Bot or Teams app registration.

appPassword.label: Client secret
appPassword.help: Create a client secret for the Microsoft app.
